sentences.arabic: الزَّكَاةُ رُكْنٌ مِنْ أَرْكَانِ الإِسْلَامِ الخَمْسَةِ.
sentences.translation: Zekat je jedan od pet stubova islama.
sentences.translationEn: Zakat is one of the five pillars of Islam.

sentences.arabic: يُعْطِي المُسْلِمُ جُزْءًا مِنْ مَالِهِ لِلفُقَرَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Musliman daje dio svog imetka siromašnima.
sentences.translationEn: The Muslim gives a portion of their wealth to the poor.

sentences.translation: Zekat čisti imetak i čini ga blagoslovenim.
sentences.translationEn: Zakat purifies wealth and blesses it.

sentences.arabic: كَثِيرٌ مِنَ النَّاسِ يُؤَدُّونَ الزَّكَاةَ فِي رَمَضَانَ.
sentences.translation: Mnogi ljudi daju zekat u Ramazanu.
sentences.translationEn: Many people pay zakat during Ramadan.
